Our Services

Quality exterior work for Wichita homeowners — done right, every time.

🏚️

Roofing

Your roof is your home's first line of defense. We handle everything from minor repairs to complete replacements — using quality materials built to withstand Kansas weather.

  • Asphalt shingle installation & replacement
  • Storm damage repair
  • Roof inspections
  • Leak detection & repair
  • Ventilation improvements
Get an Estimate
🌧️

Gutters

Properly functioning gutters protect your foundation, siding, and landscaping. We install, repair, and clean gutter systems for homes of all sizes.

  • Seamless gutter installation
  • Gutter cleaning & flushing
  • Downspout installation & repair
  • Gutter guard systems
  • Fascia & soffit repair
Get an Estimate
🏗️

Siding

New siding transforms the look of your home while adding insulation and weather protection. We install durable siding that's built to last.

  • Vinyl siding installation
  • Siding repair & replacement
  • Storm damage assessment
  • Color & style consultation
  • Trim & accent work
Get an Estimate
🎨

Interior & Exterior Painting

A fresh coat of paint is one of the most impactful upgrades you can make. We take care of all the prep work so the final finish looks and lasts its best.

  • Exterior house painting
  • Interior room painting
  • Trim & detail work
  • Deck & fence staining
  • Power washing & surface prep
Get an Estimate

Not Sure What You Need?

Give us a call or send us a message. We're happy to walk through your home and give an honest assessment.

Contact Us 316-869-9613
